for_c_level: This run exposes high risk in testing infrastructure reliability, blocking validation of AI memory federation for production. Customer-facing claims on multi-agent memory sharing remain unproven. This represents a regression from prior runs where scenarios were at least partially executed.
for_non_technical: The test aimed to see if AI agents can reliably share memories with each other in a group setup. But something went wrong in running the tests, and no results came back. So, we still don't know if the memory sharing works well.
for_sme: All 35 requested scenarios (1,1b,2,4-6,9-18,22-25,28-42) failed to produce reports, likely due to harness issues in execution or artifact collection (harness_sha: 925cfe47c7e8dd8199e7d729f95d665d1402aeca). No primitives were tested, with probable root cause in CI workflow or infra provisioning. No S# or F# details available since no reports were recovered.
headline: Campaign failed: no scenario reports recovered.
next_run_change: Investigate and resolve report recovery failures in the CI harness before the next campaign.
verdict: FAIL — no scenarios executed or reported.
what_it_proved: It demonstrated a complete failure in the test harness to execute or recover any scenario results.
what_it_tested: This campaign requested testing of 35 AI2AI memory sharing scenarios across various transports, frameworks, and primitives but recovered no reports.
